title: Enarc (disambiguation)
content:
'''Enarc''' may refer to

==Canon==
*'''[[Enarc]]''', a [[Mid Rim Territories|Mid Rim]] astronomical object
*The '''[[Enarc Run]]''', a Mid Rim [[Hyperspace route|hyperlane]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Enarc (Demophon system)|Enarc]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]]
*'''[[Enarc (Enarc system)|Enarc]]''', a planet in the [[Enarc system/Legends|Enarc system]]
*The '''[[Enarc system/Legends|Enarc system]]'''
*The '''[[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]]'''
